bupt.ta.service

类 EmailOtpService

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.service.EmailOtpService

  • public class EmailOtpService
extends java.lang.Object
    Email OTP (one-time password) generation + verification. Storage is persisted via DataStorage so restarts don't invalidate codes.

    • 嵌套类概要

      嵌套类 
      限定符和类型 类和说明
      static class  EmailOtpService.OtpRequestResult
      Result of requestOtp(bupt.ta.storage.DataStorage, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, bupt.ta.model.AdminSettings).
      static class  EmailOtpService.OtpVerifyResult
      Result of verifyOtp(bupt.ta.storage.DataStorage, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String).

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static int DEFAULT_CODE_LENGTH 
      static int DEFAULT_TTL_MINUTES 
      static int MAX_ATTEMPTS 

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      EmailOtpService() 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      EmailOtpService.OtpRequestResult requestOtp(DataStorage storage, java.lang.String email, java.lang.String purpose, AdminSettings adminSettings)
      Generates an OTP, persists it, and sends it via email (HTML + text).
      EmailOtpService.OtpVerifyResult verifyOtp(DataStorage storage, java.lang.String email, java.lang.String purpose, java.lang.String code)
      Verifies an OTP for an email and purpose.

    • 构造器详细资料

      • EmailOtpService

        public EmailOtpService()

    • 方法详细资料

      • requestOtp

        public EmailOtpService.OtpRequestResult requestOtp(DataStorage storage,
                                                   java.lang.String email,
                                                   java.lang.String purpose,
                                                   AdminSettings adminSettings)
                                            throws java.io.IOException
        Generates an OTP, persists it, and sends it via email (HTML + text).
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        email - recipient address
        purpose - logical purpose (e.g. REGISTER, RESET_PASSWORD)
        adminSettings - optional admin SMTP settings
        返回:
        success flag and detail message
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if persistence fails

      • verifyOtp

        public EmailOtpService.OtpVerifyResult verifyOtp(DataStorage storage,
                                                 java.lang.String email,
                                                 java.lang.String purpose,
                                                 java.lang.String code)
                                          throws java.io.IOException
        Verifies an OTP for an email and purpose. On success, marks the latest record as consumed.
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        email - address the code was sent to
        purpose - logical purpose matching the request
        code - user-entered verification code
        返回:
        success flag and detail message
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if persistence fails
